mapper.sql: t.id, t.material_id, t.order_id, t.material_type, t.material_name, t.material_status, t.current_version_no, t.submitter_role, t.submitter_id, t.review_comment, t.timeout_flag, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_material t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_material t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_material ( material_id, order_id, material_type, material_name, material_status, current_version_no, submitter_role, submitter_id, review_comment, timeout_flag, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{materialId}, #{orderId}, #{materialType}, #{materialName}, #{materialStatus}, #{currentVersionNo}, #{submitterRole}, #{submitterId}, #{reviewComment}, #{timeoutFlag}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_material ( material_id, order_id, material_type, material_name, material_status, current_version_no, submitter_role, submitter_id, review_comment, timeout_flag, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.materialId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.materialType}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.materialStatus}, #{item.currentVersionNo}, #{item.submitterRole}, #{item.submitterId}, #{item.reviewComment}, #{item.timeoutFlag}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_material t SET
t.material_status = #{materialStatus},
t.current_version_no = #{currentVersionNo},
t.review_comment = #{reviewComment},
t.timeout_flag = #{timeoutFlag},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_material t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
